title: Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies:
Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies!
